issue.title: cleanup_stale_tmp_files never matches its own output (.json.tmp files accumulate)

successCriteria.description: cleanup_stale_tmp_files matches files like state.json.tmp written by atomic_write, so stale temp files no longer accumulate after a crash mid-write
The .tmp matcher in fs_utils.rs uses the same suffix-on-filename approach as the watcher filter at watcher.rs:172 (name.ends_with(".tmp"))
cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml passes with no new warnings or errors

phases.title: Fix cleanup_stale_tmp_files to match .tmp files by filename suffix
verification: Suffix matching is consistent with watcher.rs:172 filter
